data.title: Why Is Software Company Five9 Stock Diving Premarket Friday?
data.description: FIVN shares down after Q2 2024 results, revenue guidance reduced, Acqueon acquisition announced.

data.title: Rivian Kicks Off Months-Long Promotional Roadshow With Upcoming R2 SUV, R3X Crossover
data.description: California-based EV startup Rivian Automotive on Thursday announced that its upcoming vehicles are out for a promotional roadshow, starting from Pasadena.

data.title: Marin Software Stock Jumps On Reddit, X Integration: Details
data.description: Marin Software enhances integrations with Reddit and X, allowing marketers to leverage AI-driven tools for targeting users on these platforms.

data.title: Plug Power Defers $50M In Sales, Misses Revenue Forecast: JPMorgan Analyst Wants A 'Show-Me Story'
data.description: Plug Power misses JPMorgan's forecast of $174 million largely due to the timing of electrolyzer revenue recognition.

data.title: What's Going On With Nvidia Stock On Friday?
data.description: Despite a $900 billion decline in market value, Nvidia's AI spending continues to surge thanks to investments from Big Tech giants and positive projections from key suppliers.
